headline: Why Caterpillar’s (CAT) Dividend Hike and Buybacks Make Capital-Return Mix Central to Its Tax Profile
summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) is one of the dividend stocks picked by financial media as investors ask whether dividend stocks are tax-efficient. On June 10, Caterpillar said its board raised the quarterly dividend by 12 cents, or 8%, to $1.63 per share, payable August 19 to shareholders of record at the close of business on July […]
